question: How many days had passed since I started taking ukulele lessons when I decided to take my acoustic guitar to the guitar tech for servicing?
gold_answer: 24 days. 25 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.
reasoning_summary: User started ukulele lessons on 2023-02-01 (source 191). User decided to take Taylor GS Mini to guitar tech for servicing on 2023-02-25 (source 207). The number of days between these two dates is 24 days.

required_slots.name: date of decision to service guitar

adaptive_choice_reason: same answer with stronger specialist support
